summary: Tested XML/CSV import, historique des modifications, and module Bâtiments accessibility. Backend tests: 11/11 passed. Frontend verification: Bâtiments module accessible via sidebar, Prevention module does NOT have Bâtiments tab (correct).
critical_code_review_comments: Line 581 in Prevention.jsx: setCurrentView('batiments') is called after import but there's no 'batiments' case in the switch statement. This is a minor bug but doesn't affect functionality since import redirects to Bâtiments module.
context_for_next_testing_agent: XML/CSV import and historique features are working. The XML parser extracts: adresse, ville, code_postal, contact_nom (propriétaire), annee_construction, nombre_etages, superficie, nombre_logements. Prevention module correctly does NOT have a Bâtiments tab - the module is accessible via the main sidebar instead.

prevention_no_batiments_tab.description: Prevention module tabs do NOT include Bâtiments (correct per requirements)

batiments_module_accessible.description: Bâtiments module accessible via main sidebar navigation

batiment_modal_conditional_buttons.description: Could not fully verify Inspecter/Plan/Rapport buttons as no buildings were in the list during test. Code review confirms buttons are conditionally shown based on hasPreventionAccess.

nombre_logements_field.description: Field exists in BatimentDetailModalNew.jsx at line 2312
